notes: Generated with built-in image generation on flat #00ff00, then converted with remove_chroma_key.py.
The accepted source sheet contains three pure robot subjects: one idle level 10 boss, one disabled wreck defeat still, and one static holograph-camera pulse particle.
The prompt required a holograph-projector head, a camera on the tail, future-war neon lighting, black outline, high-detail pixel art, and no food or organic giraffe cues.
Grouped slicing found three clean runtime frames; the particle was center-fit into a 96x96 runtime PNG.
